zoom.selectRegion: 選取要調整的縮放區域
zoom.modeManualDescription: 為此縮放設定固定的對焦點

speed.selectRegion: 選取要調整的速度區域
speed.label: 速度

effects.title: 影片效果
effects.connectZoomsDescription: 將連續的縮放區域平滑串接成一段連續的鏡頭移動。
effects.autoApplyFreshRecordingZooms: 自動套用新錄影的縮放
effects.autoApplyFreshRecordingZoomsDescription: 開啟新錄影時，自動建議游標跟隨縮放。
effects.zoomGeneralDescription: 套用於每次縮放轉場的全域動作設定。
effects.zoomInDescription: 控制相機如何進入縮放區域。
effects.zoomOutDescription: 控制相機如何離開縮放區域。
effects.connectedZoomDescription: 啟用連接後，調整連續縮放區域之間的滑行效果。
effects.webcamFootageDescription: 此影片尚未連結網路攝影機素材
effects.webcamFootageAdded: 已連結網路攝影機素材
effects.webcamFootageRemoved: 已移除網路攝影機素材
effects.cameraDebugTuningHint: Development-only spring tuning controls for camera motion.
effects.cursorDebugMovedToDev: Cursor spring tuning is available in Settings > Dev.
effects.devSectionHint: Temporary testing controls for native capture and motion tuning.
effects.exportBlurMovedToDev: Export blur tuning is available in Settings > Dev.
effects.motionBlurDebugHint: Development-only tuning for the split move-vs-zoom blur path. Pan controls drive the streak filter, and zoom controls drive the focus-centered zoom filter.
effects.nativeCaptureWarningTesterAvailable: This project is not marked as unsupported, but you can still open the modal for UI testing.
effects.nativeCaptureWarningTesterUnavailable: This project is currently marked as native capture unavailable.
effects.temporalZoomMotionBlurDescription: Control the shutter window and frame samples used by the newer zoom blur pass.
effects.motionPresetsZoomHint: Zoom motion presets are available in Settings.

focused.label: Focused
focused.description: Snappier motion for demos, walkthroughs, and everyday recordings.

smooth.label: Smooth
smooth.description: Gentler motion for presentations, keynote-style videos, and polished reveals.

none.label: Off
none.description: No click graphic. Only the cursor motion changes when you click.

ripple.label: Ripple
ripple.description: Expanding rings radiate from each click so taps read clearly in motion.

spotlight.label: Spotlight
spotlight.description: A soft halo flashes around the pointer to emphasize the clicked area.

echo.label: Echo
echo.description: A pair of soft rings that spread outward with a cleaner pulse.

captions.generatingStatus: Generating captions. This can take a moment.
captions.selectWhisperModelFirst: Select a Whisper model or download the small model first
captions.whisperSmallDeleteFailed: Failed to delete Whisper small model
captions.whisperSmallDownloadFailed: Failed to download Whisper small model

crop.title: 裁切影片
crop.instruction: 拖曳四邊以調整裁切範圍

background.title: 背景
background.uploadError: 請上傳 JPG 或 JPEG 圖片檔。

background.selectVideoFileDescription: Please select a video file (mp4, webm, mov, etc.)
